description: Above the Complexity Cliff: higher-layer lemmas + exec proof blocks

protocol.note: Files in edwards.rs and field.rs had syntax errors (closing brace in comment) that required fixing before verification. An automated process (linter/hook) repeatedly restored these files to a different state, preventing clean verification of Group B holes R7, R9, R10.

key_findings.complexity_cliff_confirmed: R5 (192 LOC, projective↔affine bridge) failed as expected. Requires ~200 lines of sequential field algebra lemma chains.
key_findings.higher_layers_accessible: L6-L8 algebraic proofs (R1, R4) were straightforward when the key insight reduces to a known algebraic identity (e.g., (-x)²=x², U/W=u via cancel).
key_findings.algorithmic_proofs_feasible: R2 (NAF parity argument) and R3 (carry cancellation) both passed despite requiring algorithmic reasoning about bit manipulation and radix reconstruction.
key_findings.exec_proofs_tractable: R6 and R8 passed easily. Exec proof blocks are simpler than standalone lemmas because they bridge postconditions/preconditions rather than proving from scratch.
recurring_patterns: lemma2_to64() needed for concrete pow2 values (pow2 is opaque)
lemma_small_mod(x, p) needed to establish x%p==x when x<p
lemma_mul_is_commutative needed for a*b==b*a in mod arithmetic
Extensional equality (=~=) with forall triggers for sequence/array proofs
SMT needs explicit recursive unfolding for spec functions on small inputs

comparison_to_round1.cliff_location: ~50-60 LOC for standalone lemmas, but 192 LOC (R5) is definitely above
comparison_to_round1.new_insight: The model handles L6-L8 algebraic proofs well when the mathematical insight is clear and translatable to known lemma sequences. The failure mode is not mathematical reasoning but the sheer volume of field algebra lemma calls needed for coordinate system bridging.
